name: Dr. Sarah Chen
text: FrontDesk Agents AI handles 200+ patient calls daily. Our front desk can finally focus on patient care instead of the phone.

name: Mike Rodriguez
text: We never miss a potential client call. The AI qualifies leads with uncanny accuracy before they even reach us.

name: James Wilson
text: Emergency calls get routed instantly to our on-call team. Revenue increased 40% since we deployed FrontDesk Agents AI.

name: Lisa Park
text: Property inquiries are handled 24/7. We book 3x more showings now — even while we sleep.

name: Dr. Amir Patel
text: Patient satisfaction scores jumped 25 points. The AI handles scheduling, refills, and FAQs flawlessly.

name: Tom Harrison
text: Claims intake is fully automated. Our agents only take calls that need a human touch. Game changer.
